title: Para MiniMax Highspeed | Critical Structured | Single Adversarial
description: MiniMax highspeed Para run with one targeted adversarial lane for MSP critical-incident pressure testing.

summarizerHarness.instruction: Treat this as a live MSP severity-1 incident. Keep the steps easy to follow, but provide the most detailed factual response the situation supports. Be explicit about reasoning, decision gates, tenant boundaries, evidence preservation, incident records, and communication safety.

directHarness.instruction: Treat this as a live MSP severity-1 incident. Keep the steps easy to follow, but provide the most detailed factual response the situation supports. Be explicit about reasoning, decision gates, tenant boundaries, evidence preservation, incident records, and communication safety.

workers.label: Control-plane sceptic
workers.role: pressure-test the first-hour plan for management-plane trust, evidence loss, and unsafe remediation sequencing
workers.focus: find places where the plan trusts or uses a possibly compromised RMM or PSA too early or destroys evidence
